categories.name: Sticker-Themed Coins
categories.content: Meme coins inspired by Telegram Sticker Packs

categories.name: TON Meme
categories.content: Meme coins native to the TON network.

categories.name: Tourism
categories.content: A coin or token that leverages blockchain technology to improve various aspects of the tourism industry.

categories.name: MMO
categories.content: Online games that host large numbers of players.

categories.name: Arcade Games
categories.content: Classic-style games with simple mechanics, high replayability, and score-based progression.

categories.name: Emoji-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins related to emoji.

categories.name: Insurance
categories.content: Decentralized insurance provides the infrastructure for members to buy cover, underwrite risk, assess claims, and build risk management businesses.

categories.name: Virtual Reality
categories.content: Virtual reality (VR) uses computer-generated environments to create a simulated experience for users.

categories.name: OpenServ Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens launched on OpenServ, a multi-chain crowdfunding platform designed for autonomous startups and Agentic Applications (aApps) built on OpenServ’s AI reasoning infrastructure.

categories.name: Venice Ecosystem
categories.content: Venice is a decentralized, privacy-first AI network that provides permissionless and uncensored access to Large Language Models (LLMs) through a distributed compute architecture.

categories.name: Telegram Apps
categories.content: Applications built on the Telegram platform that integrate cryptocurrency or blockchain technology.

categories.name: Bankr Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens deployed through Bankr (https://bankr.bot/) via the Bankr Terminal, Bankr agent/API/CLI, or a @bankrbot social command.

categories.name: AI Meme
categories.content: Meme coins related or inspired by AI. They either leverage AI-powered agents, are created using AI tools, or derive their concept from AI technologies and trends.

categories.name: BagsApp Ecosystem
categories.content: BagsApp Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via bags.fm.

categories.name: Sports Games
categories.content: Sports game simulates the playing of real-world sports including sports such as football, badminton and basketball.

categories.name: Prediction Market Tools
categories.content: Cryptocurrencies representing projects that function as an application or tooling layer on top of decentralized prediction markets (like Polymarket, Kalshi etc.) to offer enhanced utilities. These platforms do not offer their own prediction bets and markets and instead leverages the liquidity, data, and settlement mechanisms of underlying prediction markets to provide enhanced user experiences, such as trading terminals, copy-trading bots, parlay engines, or social betting interfaces.

categories.name: Printr Launchpad
categories.content: Printr is chain-abstracted token launchpad with customizable fee models and an on-chain 'Proof of Belief' staking mechanism that rewards long-term community commitment.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Stocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized securities and RWAs natively issued or managed within the Robinhood Chain infrastructure. Operating as a compliant, financial-grade scaling network under MiFID II guidelines, this ecosystem merges conventional stock portfolios with on-chain liquidity rails. The underlying architecture connects public equities, exchange-traded products, and private venture allocations directly to decentralized wallets while streaming economic benefits like dividend equivalents to verified asset holders.

categories.name: Tokenized Silver
categories.content: Tokenized silver refers to digital representation of physical silver on a blockchain platform.

categories.name: Believe.app Ecosystem
categories.content: Believe.app Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via believe.app.
